penalties.description: Two objects were dropped out of view and were not retrievable.

reasoning: Major disagreement on completion time and lost objects. GPT-4o reported 280 seconds with 2 lost objects, while Claude reported 30 seconds with no penalties. Given the extreme timing difference and GPT's specific penalty description, the conservative approach is to accept the longer time and penalties, as lost objects are automatic deductions that cannot be overlooked if they occurred.
